title: Happy Birthday!
name: Anna Kolyada
teamNote: Wishing you a wonderful day filled with joy and celebration!

title: Happy Birthday!
name: Mikhail Ladutko
message: The team celebrates your special day with warm wishes!
teamNote: Hope your birthday is filled with happiness and amazing moments!

title: Happy Birthday!
name: Armaan Pandher
message: Let's pause the busy schedule, grab a slice of cake, and take a moment to appreciate how awesome you are. You bring so much light to our work with your ideas, humor, and dedication!
teamNote: We're truly lucky to have you on the team. Here's to another year of success and adventures!

title: Innovation Excellence
headline: Building Products at Lightning Speed
description: Non-engineering teams have created so many useful tools, showing we're learning fast and moving in the right direction. This rapid innovation demonstrates our team's adaptability and creative problem-solving skills.
takeaway: When we combine speed with smart engineering practices, we unlock incredible potential for growth and efficiency.

title: Team Recognition
reason: Outstanding collaboration and problem-solving skills that drive results

title: Recognition Wave
reason: Exceptional dedication and expertise that elevates our entire team performance

title: Excellence Recognized
reason: Delivering outstanding results and demonstrating leadership in challenging projects

title: Q1 Performance Excellence
headline: Record-Low Spend Discrepancies Achieved
description: January marked historically minimal spend discrepancies, with automated LTV system launch planned in 12 weeks. Our TV Monkey model has been successfully deployed with forecast integration.

title: UA Playbook Success
headline: Health Rate System Deployed
description: New health rate metric for UA activities developed with automated scorecards. The system includes lagging and leading indicators with mandatory CVLP tracking for improved acquisition efficiency.
takeaway: Smart automation combined with precise metrics creates sustainable growth advantages.

title: Gaming Division Breakthrough
headline: Gaming Achieved Profitability
description: Our gaming division turned profitable in 2025, marking a major milestone in our diversification strategy. This success validates our long-term vision and investment in interactive entertainment.

title: Retention Champions
headline: Infinite Minesweeper Exceeds Benchmarks
description: Achieved 61% retention rate, surpassing Apple's ERA benchmark of 151-160%. Solitaire v540 delivered +21.67% D7 retention improvement, while Crossword exceeded 200% ROAS.
takeaway: When we focus on user experience and data-driven optimization, exceptional results follow.

title: AI Revolution in Progress
headline: Every Employee to Manage 5-10 AI Agents
description: Within 3-6 months, every team member will manage 5-10 AI agents. Our OKR Auditor already checks 1,000+ individual OKRs daily, and Daria AI Bot saves $4k weekly analyzing app reviews.

title: Security Excellence
headline: Fraud Slashed with Dynamic SDK
description: Fraud reduced from 22% to under 4% using dynamic SDK signatures. This dramatic improvement protects our revenue and maintains trust with partners and users.
takeaway: Proactive security measures create sustainable competitive advantages and protect long-term growth.

title: Sales Performance
headline: Exceptional Week Closes 8 Deals
description: Sales team delivered outstanding results with 8 deals closed generating $390k net revenue in one week. This performance demonstrates our strong market position and effective sales processes.
takeaway: Consistent execution and relationship building drive remarkable business outcomes.

title: Daily Wellness
description: Join Anna Kolyada for daily yoga sessions, available both in office and online streaming. A perfect way to recharge and maintain well-being during busy workdays.

title: Book Club Thriving
description: Our company book club 'Passionate Curiosity' has grown to 140+ participants, fostering learning and intellectual growth across all departments. Join us for engaging discussions and shared insights.

title: Creative Corner
headline: BidMachine Merch in Design
quote: New sweatshirt designs are being crafted to celebrate our BidMachine team!
author: Design Team

title: Engineering Excellence
headline: Build. Ship. Improve. Mentality
description: CEO mandate drives cultural shift from requirements-heavy processes to pull request mentality. Engineering scorecards automated for key teams, with focus on lagging and leading indicators for continuous improvement.
